description:
A security audit revealed that sensitive documents containing the phrase 'CLASSIFIED INFORMATION NONDISCLOSURE AGREEMENT' have been carelessly saved to the Desktop, Documents, and Downloads folders. Your task is to secure these files.

1. Mount the encrypted volume '/home/ga/Volumes/legal_vault.hc' (Password: 'Compliance2024!').
2. Find all unencrypted files in the home directory that contain the exact text 'CLASSIFIED INFORMATION NONDISCLOSURE AGREEMENT'.
3. Move these sensitive files into the root of the mounted encrypted volume.
4. Ensure the unencrypted original files are removed from their insecure locations.
5. Do NOT move or delete any other files (distractors).
6. Dismount the volume when finished.
